hooks.command:
F=/home/oto/Intership2026/HalLMediaPipe/SHARED.md; if [ -f "$F" ]; then jq -Rs --arg hdr "# SHARED.md (agent coordination file)

You MUST read this before starting work in this repo, and append a dated update to it after completing meaningful work. Do not overwrite other agents' notes.

---

" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:($hdr+.)}}' < "$F"; else jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:"SHARED.md not found in /home/oto/Intership2026/HalLMediaPipe. If you do meaningful work, create one with the agent coordination protocol so future agents inherit context."}}'; fi
